quote: Justice is the heartbeat of lasting peace; without its steady rhythm, true tranquility can never resonate.
explanation: This reminds us that peace is not just the absence of conflict, but the active, compassionate pursuit of fairness and equality for every individual. Only when every voice is heard and every right upheld can a harmonious and enduring future truly be built.
caption:
Justice is the heartbeat of lasting peace; without its steady rhythm, true tranquility can never resonate.

This reminds us that peace is not just the absence of conflict, but the active, compassionate pursuit of fairness and equality for every individual. Only when every voice is heard and every right upheld can a harmonious and enduring future truly be built.

#Cogentic #JalteDiyeFoundation #PeaceAndJustice #SocialCohesion #EthicalAI
